body_excerpt: In input_default_setkeycode of input.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to improper input validation. This could lead to local escalation of privilege in the kernel with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In input_default_setkeycode of input.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to improper input validation. This could lead to local escalation of privilege in the kernel with no additional exec
